title: Smoked Norwegian Salmon Pilaf with Spicy Chilli Kick
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish infused with the smokiness of Norwegian salmon, the heat of ancho chillies, and a hint of citrus.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced ancho chillies and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cooked pilaf rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and chillies.
Add the smoked salmon to the skillet and stir to combine with the rice mixture.
Stir in the freshly squeezed lemon juice.
Transfer the pilaf mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped cilantro.
